title: Quran, Sura 67: Al-Mulk
description: Sura 67 (Al-Mulk: The Sovereignty) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 67 (Al-Mulk: The Sovereignty) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent. He who created death and life to test you as to which of you is best in deed.
